title: calophyllum tetrapterum
intro: Calophyllum tetrapterum, also known as the Bintangor tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Calophyllum tetrapterum include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Calophyllum tetrapterum is often used in the form of oils, extracts, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested under medical supervision.
